tasks.notes: Added urllib.parse and verified production HTTP paths with urllib.request.urlopen mock.
Capped blast-radius finding severities at MEDIUM to prevent floor flooding.
Implemented symbol deduplication, caching, count cap (20), and wall-clock query budget (2.0s).
Integrated cf.map_line() coordinates mapping with out-of-bounds skipping and verification tests.
Added claims/duplicate improvements, coordinator merge/omission tests, and determinism locks.
